articles.title: Box Office: ‘Project Hail Mary’ blasts off with $80.5 million, a best for Amazon MGM, and the year
articles.description:
The science fiction epic starring Ryan Gosling earned around $80.5 million in ticket sales in its first weekend playing in North America.

The post Box Office: ‘Project Hail Mary’ blasts off with $80.5 million, a best for Amazon MGM, and the year appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ‘Project Hail Mary’ earned $80.5 million in its opening weekend in North America.
Ryan Gosling stars in this science fiction film, boosting local cinema attendance.
The film's success may lead to increased investment in Boston's film industry.

articles.title: Family appeals to Arizona community for clues in ongoing disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
articles.description:
The “Today Show” co-host posted a new family statement on her Instagram account Sunday morning, hours after the show's Instagram account shared it.

The post Family appeals to Arizona community for clues in ongoing disappearance of Nancy Guthrie appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nancy Guthrie's family seeks help from Arizona community regarding her disappearance.
The appeal was shared on Instagram by Guthrie's family and the 'Today Show'.
Boston residents may feel connected as Guthrie is a prominent media figure.
